issues.description: First Rest action targets Self unconditionally, but card text says 'You may rest this Character' as optional part of activation cost. The Self-rest should be conditional or restructured.
Rest opponent's Character action missing condition: 'If the number of your Life cards is equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards'. Current DSL has no life comparison condition.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is not a valid scope. Should use 'OpponentCharacter' with appropriate selection constraints. Also missing 'up to 1' quantifier.
